a.xlink:title: Returns true, if a connection to a remote participant has been established.
True if this process is running a slave.
Stops an event and commit it. If it's already stopped it has no effect.
Adds named integer data, associated to an event.
True if this process is running the master.
Returns the only instance (singleton) of the EventRegistry class.
Number of ranks. This includes ranks from both participants, e.g. minimal size is 2...
